(unit-resolution (unit-resolution (asserted (or c01_14 c02_15))
                                  (asserted (not c01_14))
                                  c02_15)
                 (asserted (not c02_15))
                 false)
solver_explanation:
Reasons for the clauses in the proof
(or c01_14 c02_15): r1c15 must have an unshaded neighbor not to break connectivity
answer:
```
The cell r2c15 is shaded. However, according to the Unshaded Neighbor Lemma, every shaded cell must have at least one unshaded neighbor to maintain connectivity in the grid.

Looking at row 1 and column 14 (r1c14), we see that it's already shaded. This means that r2c15 cannot be shaded because it doesn't have an unshaded neighbor to satisfy the Unshaded Neighbor Lemma. Therefore, r2c15 must remain unshaded.
```
